# Full Semester Course {.unnumbered}

Below is an organization of the content to offer a 14 week full semester with 4 contact hours. It can be roughly divided into 3 parts.

::: {.smaller}
### Overview
**Part-1: Essentials**

- Topics
    - basic principles and MLOps with Open Source Software
    - two assignments
- Learning Outcomes: students will be able to
    - deploy models with logging, documentation, unit tests,  and APIs
    - understand a conceptual framework to understand MLOps 

:::

**Part-2: Full Stack MLOps**

- Topics
    - holistic understanding of ML development, beyond chasing typical performance metrics
    - one assignment, one mini project and a midterm
- Learning Outcomes: students will be able to
    - deploy models, observe their performance, make improvements, redeploy them.  
    - ensure that the ML pipeline is reproducible. 
    - incorporate principles from Responsible AI and build ML systems which can consist of many models and tools.    

**Part-3: Application**

- Topics
    - practice, Cloud solutions
    - capstone project and presentations
    - invited lectures from Industry
- Learning Outcomes: students will be able to
    - frame, discover, develop, deploy, monitor, improve, re-deploy and maintain an ML Application


### Suggested Schedule (WIP)

::: {style="font-size: 50%;"}

+-----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| [Weeks 01-05]{.c1}                | [Essentials]{.c11}                |
+-----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| [Week 01]{.c1}                    | [Introduction and                 |
|                                   | Foundation]{.c11}                 |
|                                   |                                   |
|                                   | 1.  [Course Objectives and ML     |
|                                   |     Recap]{.c1}                   |
|                                   | 2.  [ML Lifecycle, Fullstack ML   |
|                                   |     Infrastructure]{.c1}          |
|                                   | 3.  [ML pipeline is a DAG,        |
|                                   |     Software 1.0 vs 2.0, Tool     |
|                                   |     ecosystem (Git, VS Code etc), |
|                                   |     Project Setup]{.c1}           |
|                                   | 4.  [Software Engineering Best    |
|                                   |     Practices for ML]{.c1}        |
+-----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| [Release Assignment 1]{.c1}       | [Read: some well written          |
|                                   | repositories]{.c1}                |
| [(due in two weeks)]{.c1}         |                                   |
|                                   | [Build: a "tbd" Model that is     |
| []{.c1}                           | documented, modular, testable,    |
|                                   | functional]{.c1}                  |
| [Final Projects released]{.c1}    |                                   |
|                                   |                                   |
| [(due before last week)]{.c1}     |                                   |
+-----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| [Week 02]{.c1}                    | [Data Engineering]{.c11}          |
|                                   |                                   |
|                                   | -   [Design Patterns &            |
|                                   |     Considerations, Data          |
|                                   |     Models]{.c1}                  |
|                                   | -   [ETL (with Flyte) and Feature |
|                                   |     Store (Chronon)]{.c1}         |
|                                   | -   [Data Versioning with DVC and |
|                                   |     Logging]{.c1}                 |
|                                   | -   [Feature Engineering with     |
|                                   |     TFX/DFL/Encodings]{.c1}       |
+-----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| [Week 03]{.c1}                    | [Model Development &              |
|                                   | Experimentation]{.c11}            |
|                                   |                                   |
|                                   | -   [Design Patterns &            |
|                                   |     Considerations]{.c1}          |
|                                   |                                   |
|                                   | ```{=html}                        |
|                                   | <!-- -->                          |
|                                   | ```                               |
|                                   | -   [Developing and Managing      |
|                                   |     multiple models (with         |
|                                   |     Hydra)]{.c1}                  |
|                                   | -   [Model versioning with        |
|                                   |     MLFlow]{.c1}                  |
|                                   | -   [DoEs, Experiment tracking    |
|                                   |     with WandB]{.c1}              |
+-----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| [Release Assignment 2]{.c1}       | [Read: documentation of various   |
|                                   | OSS tools]{.c1}                   |
| [(due in two weeks)]{.c1}         |                                   |
|                                   | [Build: run multiple experiments, |
|                                   | benchmark with a baseline, pick a |
|                                   | top performing model ]{.c1}       |
+-----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| [Week 04]{.c1}                    | [Deploy & Serve]{.c11}            |
|                                   |                                   |
|                                   | -   [Design Patterns &            |
|                                   |     Considerations]{.c1}          |
|                                   | -   [Deploy with Docker]{.c1}     |
|                                   | -   [Model Serving (FastAPI,      |
|                                   |     Flask)]{.c1}                  |
|                                   | -   [Build a demo with            |
|                                   |     Gradio]{.c1}                  |
+-----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| [Week 05]{.c1}                    | [Evaluation & CI/CD]{.c11}        |
|                                   |                                   |
|                                   | -   [Design Patterns &            |
|                                   |     Considerations]{.c1}          |
|                                   | -   [CI/CD with Github            |
|                                   |     Actions]{.c1}                 |
|                                   | -   [Model Evaluation and         |
|                                   |     benchmarking]{.c1}            |
|                                   | -   [A/B Testing]{.c1}            |
+-----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+
| [Release Assignment 3]{.c1}       | [Read: documentation of various   |
|                                   | OSS tools]{.c1}                   |
| [(due in two weeks)]{.c1}         |                                   |
|                                   | [Build: test multiple models, and |
|                                   | based on performance, roll out    |
|                                   | the best performing model for all |
|                                   | users]{.c1}                       |
+-----------------------------------+-----------------------------------+




openly, \
The Saddle Point
